results.text: Please check the Tauri tray icon after the service report ready.

results.text: Set the cleanup runtime to rule for the latency profile.

results.text: Granite NAR should stay under 700 milliseconds after warm up.
results.raw_asr: granite nar should stay under 700 milliseconds after warm up.
results.reference: Granite NAR should stay under seven hundred milliseconds after warm up.

results.text: Add PyTorch, ROCm, and gfx1151 to the keyword glossary.

results.text: The localhost Python inference service is listening on port 8675.

results.text: Use wtype on Wayland and xdotool on x11 when paste injection is needed.

results.reference: Use wtype on Wayland and xdotool on X eleven when paste injection is needed.

results.text: Do not add cloud fallback or transcript telemetry in version 1.
